## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `agenteval ...`
2. ...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or output.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g., Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 15)
- **.NET SDK version:** (run `dotnet --version`)
- **AgentEval CLI version:** (run `agenteval --version`)
- **AgentEval NuGet version:** (check your project)

## Additional Context

Any other context, logs, or screenshots.
